category_sources: source_facts.description says CLI tool to generate and run code with LLMs; official GitHub README says Rawdog generates and auto-executes Python scripts in the CLI.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is rawdog; official repository README title is Rawdog.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides quickstart, arguments, and model selection documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo was empty; official GitHub repository content matches source_facts description and package README, while source_facts.homepage points to mentat.ai.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify a CLI LLM assistant that generates and runs Python scripts.
